title: Add Adaptive TTT experiment results
author: kunwar-vikrant
body:
- Reproduced SOTA baseline: 1.0832 bpb (quantized+TTT, seed=42)
- Implemented adaptive TTT: allocate more epochs to harder chunks
- New hyperparams: TTT_ADAPTIVE, TTT_MAX_EPOCHS, TTT_MIN_EPOCHS, TTT_ADAPT_EMA
- Reverted TTT to SGD (better than AdamW for few-shot TTT)
- Run 2 (adaptive_ttt) incomplete due to pod eviction
- Eval-only run partial (quantized 1.1013 matched baseline)
- train_gpt_v1.py: modified SOTA with adaptive TTT support
- deploy.sh: budget-optimized deployment script
- All logs and results included
